zh.plumpton, yorkshire, england: 英國英格蘭越可爾普倫普頓 白 艾可萊薩爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Plumpton於1410年出生在英國越可爾普倫普頓 在 斯波福斯時，她的父親William Plumpton10歲，母親Alice Foljambe24歲。她於1434年與Sir Richard Aldborough在英國英格蘭越可爾普倫普頓 白 艾可萊薩爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1460年10月12日在英國越可爾普倫普頓 白 艾可萊薩爾享年50歲。

nameMeanings.name: Plumpton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called with Old English plūme, plȳme ‘plum, plum tree’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, including Plumpton (Yorkshire, Northamptonshire, Sussex, Cumbria), Fieldplumpton or Woodplumpton (Lancashire), Plympton (Devon), and a lost Plumpton in Kingsbury (Warwicks).

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Plumpton was born in 1410, in Plumpton in Spofforth, Yorkshire, England, her father, William Plumpton, was 10 and her mother, Alice Foljambe, was 24. She married Sir Richard Aldborough in 1434, in Plumpton by Ecclesall, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 12 October 1460, in Plumpton by Ecclesall, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 50.

Elle a épousé Sir Richard Aldborough en 1434, à Plumpton by Ecclesall, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 12 octobre 1460, à Plumpton by Ecclesall, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans.

ko.plumpton, yorkshire, england: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 플럼프턴 비 치레사
ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Plumpton(이)가 1410년 영국 요르크실르 플럼프턴 인 스포포스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Plumpton(은)는 10세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Foljambe(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1434년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 플럼프턴 비 치레사에서 Sir Richard Aldborough(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1460년 10월 12일 영국 요르크실르 플럼프턴 비 치레사에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Plumpton родилась в 1410 г. в местности плумптон ин споффорт, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Plumpton было 10 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Foljambe, 24.
